ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sampling_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sampling location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the sampling location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the sampling location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sampling location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., inflow, outflow, intermediate) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytes" (
  "analyte_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyte */,
  "analyte_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyte (e.g., TSS, pH, temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the analyte (e.g., mg/L, pH units, degrees Celsius) */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., instantaneous, cumulative) */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "threshold_min" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value for the analyte */,
  "threshold_max" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value for the analyte */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyte_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling run */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sampling run */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sampling run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the sampling run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the sampling run (e.g., in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the sampling run */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the sampling run */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sampling run */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sampling run details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_runs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sampling_runs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES sampling_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling run */,
  "analyte_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyte measured */,
  "flow_type" TEXT /* Type of flow (e.g., inflow, outflow) */,
  "emc" REAL /* Event mean concentration (EMC) */,
  "value" REAL /* Measured value of the analyte */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the reliability of the measurement (e.g., good, suspect, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_analyte_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyte_id") REFERENCES analytes ("analyte_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sampling_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to user details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., operator, analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing role permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high TSS, low pH) */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the resolution */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "operator_type" TEXT /* Type of operator (e.g., field, lab) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of operator creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to operator details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., sensor, sampler) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of equipment creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to equipment details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)
